---
title: Example Vault
---

# Example Vault

A small fixture vault for development and integration tests. Contains a few
hierarchical notes (`foo`, `foo.bar`, `foo.bar.baz`) and some wikilinks
between them.

This vault is opened by F5 launch via `.vscode/launch.json` so the dev host
has somewhere to land. Phase B will start using these notes for wikilink
completion and broken-link diagnostic tests.

See [[foo]] for the root of the example hierarchy.
